summary: P0 Bug Fixes Testing Complete - All features verified working. Both P0 issues are FIXED: 1) Customer UI shows 'Track Rider Live' button with tracking modal displaying rider info, location coordinates (30.7046, 76.7179), and 'View on Google Maps' button. 2) Rider can complete full visit flow without errors - compliance-check endpoint returns 200 (not 500), complete_property action works correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: P0 Fix 1 (Customer Tracking): CustomerBookings.js correctly shows 'Track Rider Live' button when rider is assigned. Tracking modal displays rider name, online status, location coordinates, and 'View on Google Maps' button.

P0 Fix 2 (Compliance Check): server.py line 2165 uses .copy() before insert_one() to prevent ObjectId mutation. This fixes the 500 Internal Server Error that was caused by MongoDB adding _id to the original dict.

P0 Fix 3 (Visit Flow): update-step endpoint at line 1893-2037 correctly handles all actions: start_pickup, arrived_customer, start_property, arrived_property, complete_property. Visit completes successfully.

success_rate.backend: 100% (12/12 tests passed, 2 skipped due to no active visit)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (Track Rider button visible, tracking modal working)

seed_data_creation: Used existing visits in database for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 bugs are fixed and verified. Customer tracking feature works - shows rider info, location, and Google Maps link. Rider visit flow works end-to-end including compliance check. The key fix was using .copy() before MongoDB insert_one() to prevent ObjectId serialization errors.

P0_Issue1_Customer_Track_Rider_Button.details: Track Rider Live button visible on customer bookings page when rider is assigned. Button has data-testid='track-rider-btn-{booking.id}'.

P0_Issue1_Customer_Tracking_Modal.details: Tracking modal shows: rider name (Paras), online status, location coordinates (30.7046, 76.7179), 'View on Google Maps' button, 'Refresh Location' button, current status.

P0_Issue2_Compliance_Check_No_500.details: Compliance check endpoint returns 200 with {status: 'saved', id: '...'} instead of 500 error. Fix: using .copy() before insert_one().

P0_Issue2_Complete_Property_Works.details: complete_property action works correctly. Visit status changes to 'completed' and properties_completed array is updated.

Full_Visit_Flow.details: Complete flow tested: accept -> start_pickup -> arrived_customer -> start_property -> arrived_property -> compliance-check -> complete_property. All steps return 200.

frontend_verification.customer_bookings_page: WORKING - Shows bookings with rider info, Track Rider Live button visible
frontend_verification.tracking_modal: WORKING - Shows rider name, online status, location coordinates, View on Google Maps button, Refresh Location button
frontend_verification.rider_dashboard: WORKING - Shows online status, available visits with ACCEPT button

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real MongoDB operations

P0_Issue1_Customer_Tracking.root_cause: CustomerBookings.js was missing the Track Rider button and tracking modal components.
P0_Issue1_Customer_Tracking.fix_applied: Added Track Rider Live button (lines 220-231) and Live Tracking Modal (lines 405-559) with rider info, location display, and Google Maps integration.
P0_Issue1_Customer_Tracking.verification: UI shows button and modal correctly. API returns rider location data.

P0_Issue2_Compliance_Check_500.root_cause: MongoDB insert_one() mutates the input dictionary by adding _id field. When the same dict was pushed to visit.compliance_checks array, it contained ObjectId which is not JSON serializable.
P0_Issue2_Compliance_Check_500.fix_applied: Line 2165: Changed from 'await db.compliance_checks.insert_one(compliance_record)' to 'await db.compliance_checks.insert_one(compliance_record.copy())' to prevent mutation.
P0_Issue2_Compliance_Check_500.verification: Compliance check endpoint returns 200 with saved status instead of 500 error.
